title: kadua lucei
intro: Kadua lucei, also known as the Koa haole or Hawaiian Kadua, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Hawaii. The leaves and stems of this plant have been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for centuries, and are known to possess medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Kadua lucei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Kadua lucei can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications such as salves and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
